title: selliguea omeiensis
intro: Selliguea omeiensis, also known as Chinese polypodium or Selaginella, is a species of flowering plant in the family Selaginellaceae, characterized by its distinctive leaf-like structures. Traditionally, Selliguea omeiensis has been used in herbal medicine due to its purported medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiviral activities. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating symptoms of coughs and colds. In herbal preparations, Selliguea omeiensis is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being incorporated into traditional remedies and tonics.
